text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 24 

MDCD_HLTH_MDCL_HOME_COV_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — Health or Medical Home Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicaid 
Health or Medical Home. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW obtains this directly from the DE Managed Care Supplemental file
